description: Official Speko Python SDK (spekoai) - one API for STT, TTS, and V2V across voice AI providers, with routing and automatic failover
rules: Install with pip install spekoai; initialize with Speko(api_key=os.environ["SPEKO_API_KEY"]) or AsyncSpeko for asyncio
Speko routes each request across multiple voice providers; express constraints (latency, cost, language) instead of hardcoding a single provider
